headline: Top Ten Payments Companies Processed $11 Trillion in 2025 Payment Card Volume
summary: OMAHA, Neb., April 06, 2026--TSG (The Strawhecker Group), a globally recognized analytics, intelligence, and solutions-focused firm in the payments industry, worked with payments companies to compile the industry’s most comprehensive resource on merchant acquirers. Collectively, the companies highlighted process over 95% of all card payment volume in the U.S.
